title: Aero-Reformation
description: Added a SubLevel-adapted chunk loader for Aeronautics, several useful changes, and new blocks, such as a chair that outputs redstone signals based on the player's view angle.
body:
This mod adds new features and blocks for Aeronautics.

Right-click a Navigation Table or Gimbal Sensor with a Redstone Torch to invert their output for more precise control.

Right-click a Mechanical Bearing to set it to bidirectional mode, allowing both input directions to provide rotation.

Right-click a Mechanical Bearing with an Iron Ingot to increase its stiffness and prevent block offset.

Levitite can be harvested with a Silk Touch Golden Pickaxe.

SubLevel-adapted chunk loader that also marks your SubLevel on Xaero's map.
 
The Ender Compass syncs its position to other Ender Compasses on the same frequency.

The Direction Synchronizer outputs different redstone signals based on its facing direction.

The Sensor Agency integrates all four sensor types, making flight control more compact.

A HUD overlay is included — while wearing Goggles, right-click any sensor with an empty hand to display its data on screen.
